name: Morning Yoga Flow
description: Gentle morning stretch and yoga flow to start your day

exercises.name: Downward Dog
instructions: Start on hands and knees
Push hips up and back straightening your legs
Press heels toward the floor
Keep arms straight and head between biceps

exercises.name: Cobra Stretch
instructions: Lie face down with hands under shoulders
Press up lifting chest off the floor
Keep hips on the ground and open your chest
Hold and breathe deeply
exercises.formTip: Open your chest, pull shoulders back

exercises.name: Plank
instructions: Place forearms on the ground with elbows under shoulders
Extend legs back and rise onto your toes
Keep body in a straight line from head to heels
Hold position while breathing steadily

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat
Push hips up toward the ceiling
Squeeze glutes hard at the top
Lower back down slowly with control
exercises.formTip: Squeeze glutes at the top, open hips

exercises.name: Seated Forward Bend
instructions: Sit with legs extended straight in front
Reach forward toward your toes
Hold the stretch breathing deeply
Keep spine long and do not round excessively
exercises.formTip: Long spine, pull gently with arms

exercises.name: Neck Side Stretch
instructions: Stand or sit with good posture
Tilt head to one side bringing ear toward shoulder
Hold the stretch gently for several breaths
Repeat on the other side
exercises.formTip: Relax shoulders, breathe into the stretch

exercises.name: Tree Pose
instructions: Stand on one leg with the other foot on your inner thigh
Bring hands together at chest or overhead
Fix your gaze on one point for balance
Hold and breathe then switch sides
exercises.formTip: Hold balance, fix gaze on one point

exercises.name: Savasana
instructions: Lie flat on your back with arms at sides
Close your eyes and relax every muscle
Focus on slow deep breathing
Stay still and release all tension
